title: Dependency Dashboard
body:
This issue lists Renovate updates and detected dependencies. Read the [Dependency Dashboard](https://docs.renovatebot.com/key-concepts/dashboard/) docs to learn more.
[View this repository on the Mend.io Web Portal](https://developer.mend.io/github/podman-container-tools/podman). ## Rate-Limited The following updates are currently rate-limited. To force their creation now, click on a checkbox below. - [ ] Update common, image, and storage deps to 9ba4d11 (`go.podman.io/image/v5`, `go.podman.io/storage`) - [ ] Update actions/labeler action to v6.2.0 - [ ] Update module golang.org/x/crypto to v0.54.0 - [ ] Update module golang.org/x/net to v0.57.0 - [ ] 🔐 **Create all rate-limited PRs at once** 🔐 --- > [!WARNING] > Renovate failed to look up the following dependencies: `Could not determine new digest for update (go package go.podman.io/common)`. > > Files affected: `go.mod` --- ## Other Branches The following updates are pending. To force the creation of a PR, click on a checkbox below. - [ ] Update module github.com/kevinburke/ssh_config to v1.6.0 ## Open The following updates have all been created. To force a retry/rebase of any, click on a checkbox below. - [ ] [Update module golang.org/x/crypto to v0.52.0 [SECURITY]](../pull/29143) - [ ] [Update dessant/lock-threads action to v6.0.2](../pull/28751) - [ ] [Update module github.com/containers/ocicrypt to v1.3.1](../pull/29134) - [ ] [Update module github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/v8 to v8.4.0](../pull/29149) - [ ] [Update module github.com/go-swagger/go-swagger to v0.35.0](../pull/28809) - [ ] [Update module golang.org/x/sync to v0.22.0](../pull/29146) - [ ] [Update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.47.0](../pull/29147) - [ ] [Update module golang.org/x/term to v0.45.0](../pull/29151) - [ ] [Update module github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/v2 to v3](../pull/28685) - [ ] **Click on this checkbox to rebase all open PRs at once** ## Detected Dependencies
